nuwave/lighthouse.name: nuwave/lighthouse
nuwave/lighthouse.description: A framework for serving GraphQL from Laravel

suggest.pusher/pusher-php-server: Required when using the Pusher Subscriptions driver
suggest.mll-lab/laravel-graphiql: A graphical interactive in-browser GraphQL IDE - integrated with Laravel
suggest.google/protobuf: Required when using the tracing driver federated-tracing
suggest.ext-protobuf: Improve protobuf serialization performance (used for tracing)

suggest.bensampo/laravel-enum: Convenient enum definitions that can easily be registered in your Schema

suggest.haydenpierce/class-finder: Required for the artisan command lighthouse:validate-schema
suggest.mll-lab/laravel-graphql-playground: GraphQL IDE for better development workflow - integrated with Laravel
